name: Web search chatbot with Exa and Firecrawl deep scraping
description: Takes a user question, performs a web search with Exa, deep-scrapes the most relevant results with Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to synthesize a detailed answer with source citations, and posts it to Slack.

source.originalName: Build a web search chatbot with GPT-4o and MCP Brave Search

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for deep scraping

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the answer

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for the chatbot response

userMessage.description: User question or message to answer using web search (e.g. 'What are the best practices for Kubernetes security in 2025?')

steps.name: Build search query from user message
Extract top results and pick best for deep scraping
Deep scrape top 3 results with Firecrawl
Compile search results and deep scrape content
Build AI prompt for comprehensive answer
Run Claude AI to generate answer
Build Slack Block Kit chatbot response
